title: Create scheduled Zalo group messages or agent jobs
triggerExamples: mỗi sáng gửi báo cáo vào nhóm
cron mỗi ngày tìm tin rồi gửi nhóm
tokenSource: Telegram CEO web_fetch automatically attaches internal bearer auth for localhost API; no model-visible token

apiCalls.purpose: list existing cron entries and available Zalo groups
agent-mode delivery target after cron finishes

successProofs: custom-crons.json entry is enabled and schedulable
safe openzca parser accepts fixed-message prompt
negativeTests: must refresh embedded internal tokens after app restart
